en: Yeah, I'll meet you in the car, on the corner But we know it's gotta change sometime
You know I love the taste of your water But I think it's time to say goodbye
ja: 愛だけが全てだった、君が最初で、僕もそうだった
zhTW: 愛是我們所知的一切，你是第一個，我也是
vi: Tình yêu là tất cá nhưng gì chúng ta biết, em là người đầu tiền, anh cũng vậy

en: Yeah, I'll meet you in the car, on the corner But you're never gonna change my mind
You know I wanna stay, but you gotta
Leave you cause it don't feel right this time, alright
Slipping through the streets all night Still bruising from your chalk skin bites
Meet you in the car, four or five Not sleeping at your place tonight
Mondays always on my mind Pretending everything's alright
I couldn't have you on my doorstep I wouldn't wanna waste your time
